## 🗒 Description
Provide a concise and clear description of what needs to be built, fixed, or improved.  
State the purpose, scope, and expected outcome of this issue.

---

## ✅ Tasks
- [ ] Clearly list all action items or subtasks.
- [ ] Each task should be small enough to test or review individually.
- [ ] Use present tense verbs (e.g., “Implement”, “Add”, “Fix”, “Create”).

---

## 👥 Assignees
Mention team members responsible for this issue (e.g. @Waahguptaji @AsmitaSagarkar)

---

## 🏷 Labels
List relevant labels separated by commas (e.g. `frontend`, `backend`, `feature`, `chore`, `security`)

---

> 💡 **Guidelines**
> - Prefix issue titles with a conventional commit-style tag (e.g. `feat(auth):`, `chore(ci):`, `fix(ui):`).
> - Keep one major concern per issue.
> - For pull requests: reference issue IDs using `Closes #<number>`.
> - Maintain the same structure for frontend and backend issues for uniformity.
